channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 10 ways AI can make farmers’ jobs easier
item.description: For those who work the earth, AI can be an invaluable tool for making that work more efficient, sustainable and productive. AI helps farmers use the same tools they have been using for centuries, but with improved efficiency and focus.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: DJI Mic Mini: Tiny Wireless Mic for Smartphones and Cameras
item.description: DJI's latest wireless mic offering: compact size, easy pairing with smartphones and cameras
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Zoom reveals major rebrand — dropping video as it goes all-in on AI
item.description: Zoom wants to distance itself from video calls only as it seeks to get a slice of the office software market.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Navigating the cybersecurity threat landscape in the UAE: Strategies for CISOs
item.description: In recent years, the United Arab Emirates has emerged as a global hub for technology and innovation. With rapid digitization across various sectors and an increasing reliance on digital infrastructure, the country has witnessed a parallel rise in cybersecurity threats.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia’s new AI model Fugatto can generate music and audio
item.description: Nvidia on Monday showed a new artificial intelligence model for generating music and audio that can modify voices and generate novel sounds — technology aimed at the producers of music, films and video games.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft 365 Services Hit with Global Outage
item.description: Thousands of Microsoft 365 users worldwide reported issues with services like Outlook and Teams due to a global outage
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California could offer electric vehicle rebates if Trump eliminates tax credit, Newsom says
item.description: Money for the new rebate system could come from the state’s Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund, which is funded by polluters under the state’s cap-and-trade program, the governor’s office said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft investigating outages affecting Outlook, Teams
item.description: An outage at Microsoft impacted thousands of online users on Monday as they attempted to use its Microsoft 365 service for emails, calendars and other features.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Local Business Owners Thrive in Revitalized Downtown Area
item.description: Discover how local business owners are benefiting from the revitalization of downtown areas, with increased foot traffic and improved infrastructure leading to growth and success.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, The Hill

item.title: The Onion's bid for Alex Jones' Infowars hangs in the balance as judge orders new hearing
item.description: A federal judge in Texas has delayed a hearing in conspiracy theorist Alex Jones' effort to stop the satirical news outlet The Onion from buying Infowars and turning it into a parody.
item.dc:creator: Dave Collins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Stanford prof accused of using AI to fake testimony in Minnesota case against conservative YouTuber
item.description: Jeff Hancock, an expert on AI and misinformation, has been accused of fabricating an expert declaration by citing a study that was allegedly made up by AI.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to get started with Bluesky
item.description: Looking for a new social media platform? You could try Bluesky, where the vibe is seemingly welcoming and there are noticeably fewer trolls.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Musk, Ramaswamy ‘DOGE’ confidence in Supreme Court may be tested
item.description: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy are leaning on the conservative Supreme Court to support their ambitious plans to slash federal regulations and increase government efficiency.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, The Hill

item.title: Grimes says Elon Musk became ‘unrecognizable’ amid nasty custody fight
item.description: To Grimes, Musk was the 'love of my life' -- until he decided to fight her for custody and to try and keep her from their three young children for months on end.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A Thai court on Thursday threw out a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist which alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: JERRY HARMER and DAVID RISING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Backup Software vs. Backup as a Service (BaaS): The Key Differences
item.description: As data volumes increase exponentially, the threat of data loss from cyberattacks, human error, or system failure has never been greater — which is why, in 2025, fortifying a data protection strategy has never made more sense.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to protect your deliveries from getting stolen by porch pirates
item.description: Porch pirates are on the prowl this holiday season. Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson has a number of tips to prevent holiday package thefts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SONiC pioneer Aviz Networks raises $17M for AI network management push
item.description: Networking software provider Aviz Networks today announced a $17 million Series A funding round to accelerate its growth in open networking solutions and artificial intelligence capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Comcast to spin off cable networks that were once the entertainment giant's star performers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Comcast is spinning off into a new company many of the cable television networks that were once at the entertainment giant's heart as consumers increasingly swap out their cable TV subscriptions for streaming platforms.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: OpenTelemetry certification launches
item.description: A new certification program from the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) and Linux Foundation is aimed at validating the skills needed to utilize OpenTelemetry to gain visibility across distributed systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft unveils imaging APIs for Windows Copilot Runtime
item.description: Microsoft’s Windows Copilot Runtime, which allows developers to integrate AI capabilities into Windows, is being fitted with AI-backed APIs for image processing. It will also gain access to Phi 3.5 Silica, a custom-built generative AI model for Copilot+ PCs.
item.dc:creator: Info World
